examples: You can try some spicy hotchpotch.
His essay was a hotchpotch of other people's ideas.
I recommend Ladies' Street. It's famous for the spicy hotchpotch.
This suggests that a carbon tax would be more efficient than the current hotchpotch of policies.
Cardiff Central AM Jenny Rathbone branded the Conservative motion a "hotchpotch" and argued that if people don't trust their councils, then they're unlikely to engage.
